Operation 'alertcenter.alerts.batchDelete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too generic and lacks critical details. Added: (1) what inputs are expected (BatchDeleteAlertsRequest with alert IDs), (2) what is returned (BatchDeleteAlertsResponse with results), (3) side effects (alerts marked for deletion, recoverable via undelete), and (4) actionable summary. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Performs batch delete operation on alerts.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete multiple alerts in a single request
data.description_suggestion: Deletes multiple alerts in a single batch operation. Accepts a BatchDeleteAlertsRequest containing a list of alert IDs to delete. Returns a BatchDeleteAlertsResponse with the results of the deletion operation, including any failures or errors. Deleted alerts are marked for deletion and may be recovered using the undelete operation.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and lacks critical details. Added: (1) what inputs are expected (BatchDeleteAlertsRequest with alert IDs), (2) what is returned (BatchDeleteAlertsResponse with results), (3) side effects (alerts marked for deletion, recoverable via undelete), and (4) actionable summary. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'alertcenter.alerts.batchUndelete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks specificity about operation purpose and effects. Added: (1) clarification that this recovers deleted alerts (not just performs an undelete action), (2) input details (BatchUndeleteAlertsRequest with alert IDs), (3) output details (BatchUndeleteAlertsResponse with results), (4) side effects (alerts restored to active state, visible in listings). Improved summary emphasizes recovery action for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Performs batch undelete operation on alerts.
data.summary_suggestion: Recover multiple deleted alerts in a single request
data.description_suggestion: Recovers multiple alerts that were previously marked for deletion in a single batch operation. Accepts a BatchUndeleteAlertsRequest containing a list of alert IDs to recover. Returns a BatchUndeleteAlertsResponse with the results of the undelete operation, including any failures or errors. Undeleted alerts are restored to their active state and become visible again in alert listings.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about operation purpose and effects. Added: (1) clarification that this recovers deleted alerts (not just performs an undelete action), (2) input details (BatchUndeleteAlertsRequest with alert IDs), (3) output details (BatchUndeleteAlertsResponse with results), (4) side effects (alerts restored to active state, visible in listings). Improved summary emphasizes recovery action for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'alertcenter.getSettings' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is minimal and lacks context. Added: (1) clarification that settings are domain-specific and require authentication, (2) output details (Settings object with configuration and preferences), (3) domain context about what settings control. Summary improved to be more specific and action-oriented for AI agent interpretation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the customer-level settings for the authenticated domain. Returns a Settings object containing the domain's alert configuration and preferences. This operation requires authentication and returns settings specific to the authenticated customer's domain.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks context. Added: (1) clarification that settings are domain-specific and require authentication, (2) output details (Settings object with configuration and preferences), (3) domain context about what settings control. Summary improved to be more specific and action-oriented for AI agent interpretation.

message: Operation 'alertcenter.updateSettings' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks essential details for AI agent usage. Added: (1) input details (Settings object with fields to update), (2) output details (updated Settings object), (3) side effects (changes take effect immediately, affect domain-wide alert behavior), (4) clarification about partial update support. Summary improved to be more specific and action-oriented.

data.description_suggestion: Updates the customer-level settings for the authenticated domain. Accepts a Settings object with the fields to update. Returns the updated Settings object reflecting the changes. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Changes take effect immediately and affect alert behavior for the entire domain.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks essential details for AI agent usage. Added: (1) input details (Settings object with fields to update), (2) output details (updated Settings object), (3) side effects (changes take effect immediately, affect domain-wide alert behavior), (4) clarification about partial update support. Summary improved to be more specific and action-oriented.

message: Operation 'alertcenter.alerts.list' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal. Added context about what is returned (ListAlertsResponse), that it supports filtering/pagination, and what information alerts contain. Summary provides clear action and context for AI agents to understand when to use this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: List all alerts for the domain
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all alerts affecting the domain. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters. Returns a ListAlertsResponse containing an array of Alert objects with their metadata, severity, and status information.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added context about what is returned (ListAlertsResponse), that it supports filtering/pagination, and what information alerts contain. Summary provides clear action and context for AI agents to understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'alertcenter.alerts.get' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about what is returned. Enhanced to specify that it returns an Alert object with its properties, making it clearer for AI agents what data they will receive.

data.current_description: Gets the specified alert. Attempting to get a nonexistent alert returns `NOT_FOUND` error.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific alert by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the full details of a specific alert by its ID. Returns an Alert object containing all alert properties including type, severity, timestamp, affected entities, and metadata. Returns `NOT_FOUND` error if the alert does not exist.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what is returned. Enhanced to specify that it returns an Alert object with its properties, making it clearer for AI agents what data they will receive.

message: Operation 'alertcenter.alerts.feedback.list' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Added clarity about the response structure (ListAlertFeedbackResponse) and what feedback contains. Summary provides clear action context for AI agents.

data.current_description: Lists all the feedback for an alert. Attempting to list feedbacks for a non-existent alert returns `NOT_FOUND` error.
data.summary_suggestion: List all feedback for an alert
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all customer feedback submitted for a specific alert. Returns a ListAlertFeedbackResponse containing an array of AlertFeedback objects with feedback type, timestamp, and customer comments. Returns `NOT_FOUND` error if the alert does not exist.
data.reasoning: Added clarity about the response structure (ListAlertFeedbackResponse) and what feedback contains. Summary provides clear action context for AI agents.

message: Operation 'alertcenter.alerts.feedback.create' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Enhanced to clarify input (AlertFeedback object) and output (created AlertFeedback with timestamp/ID). Summary uses domain-appropriate terminology ('Submit feedback'). Helps AI agents understand the request/response contract.

data.current_description: Creates new feedback for an alert. Attempting to create a feedback for a non-existent alert returns `NOT_FOUND` error. Attempting to create a feedback for an alert that is marked for deletion returns `FAILED_PRECONDITION' error.
data.description_suggestion: Creates new customer feedback for a specific alert. Accepts an AlertFeedback object in the request body. Returns the created AlertFeedback object with assigned timestamp and ID. Returns `NOT_FOUND` error if the alert does not exist, or `FAILED_PRECONDITION` error if the alert is marked for deletion.
data.reasoning: Enhanced to clarify input (AlertFeedback object) and output (created AlertFeedback with timestamp/ID). Summary uses domain-appropriate terminology ('Submit feedback'). Helps AI agents understand the request/response contract.

message: Operation 'alertcenter.alerts.getMetadata' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Added clarity about what metadata contains and the response type (AlertMetadata). Summary provides clear action for AI agents to distinguish this from the full alert retrieval operation.

data.current_description: Returns the metadata of an alert. Attempting to get metadata for a non-existent alert returns `NOT_FOUND` error.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the metadata for a specific alert, including alert type, severity, timestamp, affected entities, and other contextual information. Returns an AlertMetadata object. Returns `NOT_FOUND` error if the alert does not exist.
data.reasoning: Added clarity about what metadata contains and the response type (AlertMetadata). Summary provides clear action for AI agents to distinguish this from the full alert retrieval operation.
